meaning: lv.(使)(航空器等)脱离轨道 lln.(航空器等的)脱离轨道
examples: Small satellites shouldn't add to the problem of space debris since they are relatively easy to deorbit.
To keep people on the ground safe, it's best to deorbit a spacecraft with a strong burn of propellant, to slow it down at the right time.
It's evaluated for every area I and every chunk from a given spacecraft. If the sum total exceeds.0001-i.e., a 1 in 10,000 chance of a single casualty-that craft requires a controlled deorbit.
